specialtiesKey: Boat Mechanics & Engine Repair,Captains & Crew,Yacht Management

content.about:
I am Captain John LaFlair, a dedicated marine professional based in Boynton Beach, FL, with over 25 years of experience navigating and managing vessels throughout South Florida's pristine waterways. My passion for the ocean began when I was just 18 years old, and since then I have built a career commanding boats of all types and sizes across some of the most beautiful marine destinations in the region — from the Intracoastal Waterway to the open Atlantic.

My services cover three core areas: Captains & Crew, Yacht Management, and Boat Mechanics & Engine Repair. Whether you need a licensed captain for a day trip, a full-time crew placement, or comprehensive yacht management that keeps your vessel in top condition year-round, I bring both hands-on experience and formal training to every engagement. On the mechanical side, I handle engine diagnostics, marine engine repair, and onboard systems troubleshooting — keeping boats running reliably whether they are docked in Boynton Beach or cruising the broader Palm Beach County coastline.

I work with boat owners, yacht owners, and vessel operators across South Florida, including communities throughout Palm Beach County and the surrounding region within a 40-mile radius of Boynton Beach. My clients trust me because I treat every vessel with the same care I would give my own. With over two decades on the water and a verified record in the marine industry, I am committed to delivering professional, reliable service every time — no shortcuts, no guesswork.

serviceDescriptions.Captains & Crew: Captain John LaFlair provides licensed captain services and professional crew placement for vessels of all types and sizes. Whether you need a qualified captain for a single voyage, a delivery run, or ongoing crew coordination, every engagement is handled with 25-plus years of hands-on seamanship and formal maritime training.
serviceDescriptions.Yacht Management: Comprehensive yacht management services keep your vessel maintained, crewed, and ready to go at a moment's notice. From coordinating routine maintenance schedules and vendor relationships to overseeing compliance and onboard systems, Captain LaFlair manages the full lifecycle of yacht ownership so you can focus on enjoying time on the water.
serviceDescriptions.Boat Mechanics & Engine Repair: Captain LaFlair diagnoses and repairs marine engines and onboard mechanical systems across a wide range of vessel types. Services include engine troubleshooting, mechanical repairs, and systems inspections — delivering reliable, experienced work that keeps boats running safely and efficiently.

reviewSynopsis.summary: Our clients consistently highlight our unwavering commitment to safety and professionalism, with many noting that they feel completely secure on the water even in rough or challenging conditions. Divers of all experience levels praise our deep knowledge of local dive sites and our ability to select the perfect locations for the best possible underwater experience. Our friendly demeanor and passion for the ocean make every charter not only safe and well-organized, but genuinely fun and memorable for everyone on board.
